message:
feat(polyfills): Round 14 - fs sync ops, os constants, crypto keys

FS sync operations:
- fdatasyncSync: flush file data to disk
- futimesSync: update timestamps by fd
- lutimesSync: update symlink timestamps
- statfsSync: get filesystem statistics

OS constants:
- os.constants.signals: SIGTERM, SIGKILL, SIGINT, etc.
- os.constants.errno: ENOENT, EACCES, EEXIST, etc.

Crypto KeyObject API:
- createSecretKey: create KeyObject from buffer
- generateKeySync: generate symmetric key (aes/hmac)

Bug fixes:
- Fixed Timeval struct: tv_usec is i32 on macOS (was i64)
- Fixed lstat to return actual timestamps (was using current time)
